docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY REDMOND, SCOTT AS TO DEFENDANT IN-Q-TEL, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-09-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF REDMOND, SCOTT
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF REDMOND, SCOTT
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT IN-Q-TEL, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. " DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO DISMISS PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM WITH PREJUDICE IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S CAUSE OF ACTION AROSE ON JUNE 12, 2011 AND PLAINTIFF FILED THIS CLAIM IN SMALL CLAIMS COURT ON NOVEMBER 17, 2014. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS BARRED BY THE APPLICABLE THREE YEAR STATUE OF LIMITATIONS COVERING THE CLAIM. CIVIL CODE SECTION 3426.6. DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURNED MAIL: ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAILED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED=RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED, UNABLE TO FORWARD
PROOF OF SERVICE ON IN-TEL'S MOTION TO DISMISS "FILED PURSUANT TO LITIGANT'S REQUEST" FILED BY DEFENDANT IN-Q-TEL, INC.
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT FILED BY DEFENDANT IN-Q-TEL, INC.
IN-Q-TEL'S MOTION TO DISMISS AND [PROPOSED] ORDER GRANTING IN-Q-TEL'S MOTION TO DISMISS. "FILED PURSUANT TO LITIGANT'S REQUEST" FILED BY DEFENDANT IN-Q-TEL, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES -0- SERVED NOV-21-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT IN-Q-TEL, INC.
